projects.title: HMH Learning Platform
projects.description: High-performance educational technology platform serving millions of students globally. Architected microfrontend system with reactive backend services, achieving sub-100ms response times under load.
projects.challenge: Scale a real-time platform for large concurrent test sessions while keeping latency low and data consistent across services.
projects.solution: Implemented microfrontends with Module Federation, reactive Spring Boot services, and optimized Aurora PostgreSQL + Hasura connection pooling with Datadog monitoring.
impact: Serves millions of students across K-12 education globally
Sub-100ms P99 latency maintained under peak load of 15,000+ concurrent users
99.9% uptime for critical educational services with zero critical incidents since launch
8,250+ requests per second handled at 50% resource utilization

projects.title: Federated GraphQL Gateway
projects.description: Designed and led the rollout of a federated GraphQL gateway that unified 12+ microservices behind a single, composable schema — simplifying client integration and enabling independent service evolution.
projects.challenge: Multiple teams maintained separate GraphQL endpoints with duplicated types and inconsistent schemas, leading to client complexity and deployment coupling.
projects.solution: Adopted Apollo Federation with a managed gateway, established schema governance via CI linting, and migrated services incrementally with zero client disruption.
impact: Unified 12+ microservice APIs into a single composable graph
Reduced client-side data-fetching code by 35% across frontend apps
Enabled independent service deployments without coordinated releases
Established schema governance process adopted across 3 engineering teams

projects.title: Database Performance Optimization
projects.description: Resolved critical performance bottlenecks in Aurora PostgreSQL cluster serving high-traffic educational platform. Optimized connection pooling and query patterns to eliminate latency spikes during peak load.
projects.challenge: Severe latency spikes during peak hours caused by connection exhaustion and inefficient query patterns.
projects.solution: Tuned Hasura connection pooling, optimized query patterns and indexes, and added Datadog monitoring to track connection usage and performance.
impact: 90% reduction in P95 latency — from 7+ seconds to sub-100ms during peak load
Eliminated all connection timeout errors affecting user experience
Reduced database load by 70% through query optimization and caching
Improved user experience for millions of students during critical testing periods

projects.title: Monorepo Build Performance
projects.description: Dramatically improved build performance across massive 600+ package monorepo by migrating from Babel to SWC and optimizing webpack configurations, achieving 65-70% reduction in build times.
projects.challenge: 10-15 minute builds in a 600+ package monorepo slowed developer feedback and CI.
projects.solution: Migrated Babel to SWC, optimized webpack caching/splitting, moved to PNPM, and resolved dependency/symlink issues impacting builds.
impact: 65-70% reduction in build times — from 10-15 minutes to 3-5 minutes
Saved hundreds of developer hours monthly across entire engineering team
Improved CI/CD pipeline efficiency with faster feedback loops
Enhanced developer experience with near-instant hot module replacement

projects.title: API Testing Chrome Extension
projects.description: Chrome extension for intercepting and testing API requests in real-time. Features include request modification, authentication handling, comprehensive response inspection, and request replay functionality.
projects.challenge: Test and debug API requests without switching tools or modifying app code.
projects.solution: Built a Chrome extension with request interception and a React UI for modifying/replaying requests, plus IndexedDB history and auth header injection.
impact: Accelerated API debugging workflow by eliminating tool context switching
Reduced development time for API integration testing by 40%
Improved team productivity across multiple development teams
Adopted as standard tool by engineering organization

projects.title: Multi-Tool React Application
projects.description: Comprehensive collection of 22 lightweight React-based productivity and development tools with beautiful modern design. Features password generation, color testing, unit converters, JSON formatters, and various utilities.
projects.challenge: Ship an offline-friendly tool suite with fast loads and minimal dependencies.
projects.solution: Built a modular React app with code splitting, local storage persistence, and Web Crypto-based utilities to keep the initial bundle small.
impact: 22 professional-grade tools in single fast-loading application (< 2s initial load)
Zero external dependencies for core functionality ensuring privacy
Fully responsive design works seamlessly on mobile and desktop
Growing user base with positive feedback on performance and UX

projects.title: Nimaz - Islamic Companion App
projects.description: Android app focused on offline-first architecture and reliability: location-based prayer time calculations, Qibla compass, and background notifications built with a modern Kotlin stack.
projects.challenge: Deliver accurate prayer times with robust offline behavior and dependable background scheduling across Android versions.
projects.solution: Implemented MVVM with Kotlin + Coroutines, Room for local persistence, WorkManager for resilient scheduling/notifications, and location/sensor integrations for prayer times and Qibla.
impact: Offline-first UX with cached data via Room and graceful degraded mode
Reliable background scheduling and notifications using WorkManager
Accurate location + sensor integration for prayer times and Qibla
Modern, accessible UI built with Material Design 3

projects.title: Expense Tracker
projects.description: Modern expense tracking application with secure authentication, beautiful data visualization, and intuitive expense categorization. Built with React and Firebase for real-time synchronization across all devices.
projects.challenge: Real-time sync across devices while keeping auth and data handling secure.
projects.solution: Used Firebase Auth + Firestore (with offline support) and Recharts visualizations for spending insights with a clean Tailwind UI.
impact: Real-time expense synchronization across all user devices
Beautiful, interactive data visualizations for spending insights
Secure user authentication with industry-standard practices
Offline support with automatic sync when connection restored
